description_long: This barn features a modern farmhouse design with a prominent central gable flanked by two lower wings, each with a dark, sloped roof. The front facade includes two large garage-style doors and a covered entryway, while the rear showcases a spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating and potted plants. Multiple windows are symmetrically arranged along the sides and upper story, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior siding is horizontal, giving the structure a clean, contemporary appearance. The roof is a combination of gable and shed styles, with the main section rising above the side wings. The barn is set on a flat base, with paved and landscaped areas surrounding the structure.
description: A modern farmhouse-style barn with a central gable, two garage doors, horizontal siding, and a mix of gable and shed roofs. Features include a rear deck, symmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: The rear view highlights a large wooden deck with outdoor furniture, potted plants, and multiple windows on the main and upper levels.
description_view_1: The left side view shows a long horizontal facade with evenly spaced windows and a paved walkway, as well as landscaped greenery.
description_view_2: The front view displays two large garage-style doors, a covered entry, and the central gable rising above the side wings.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a long horizontal facade, windows, and a deck area visible at the far end.
attribute_roof_type: central gable roof with shed-style side roofs
attribute_door_style: double carriage-style garage doors with a single standard entry door
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple symmetrically arranged windows on all sides, including upper and lower levels
attribute_architectural_style: contemporary American barn with farmhouse influences
